title: Scaphosepalum anchoriferum
taxonomy: Scaphosepalum anchoriferum is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This species belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is a large group of orchids that are predominantly epiphytic. Scaphosepalum anchoriferum is further categorized within the tribe Vandeae, known for their unique growth habits and often brightly colored flowers. More specifically, it is placed in the subtribe Angraecinae, which includes a diverse array of orchid species. Further classification at the genus and species level places Scaphosepalum anchoriferum as a distinct member of the genus Scaphosepalum.
